# Sunsynk Report Platform

> Paid home energy insights reports for Sunsynk solar and battery systems. Turns roughly one month of device readings into an executive overview, estimated savings, system health score, solar and battery analysis, and prioritised actions in a PDF. Report credit bundles from GBP 2.99 / ZAR 69.99 / USD 4.29 with no subscription. Credits never expire.

Sunsynk Report Platform (sunsynkreports.com) is the marketing site for a self-serve report product aimed primarily at residential Sunsynk system homeowners. Checkout and report generation run at https://app.sunsynkreports.com. Copy and spelling follow British English (en-GB).

Preferred citation name: Sunsynk Report Platform. Parent brand: Sunsynk.

## Primary

- [Home](https://sunsynkreports.com/): Homeowner journey covering trust, savings, health, sample compare, what is inside, prioritised actions, how it works, pricing and FAQ
- [Get a report (app)](https://app.sunsynkreports.com/): Purchase flow and report generation for Sunsynk devices

## Product facts

- [Pricing on home page](https://sunsynkreports.com/#pricing): Starter 1 credit, Classic 3 credits (Most Popular), Pro 6 credits (Best Value); GBP/ZAR/USD; credits never expire; Stripe checkout; no subscription
- [Sample](https://sunsynkreports.com/#sample-insights): With versus without report comparison
- [What is inside](https://sunsynkreports.com/#whats-inside): Grouped solar, battery and evening cost analysis
- [How it works](https://sunsynkreports.com/#how-it-works): Connect system, analyse one month, review the story, download PDF

## Full context

- [llms-full.txt](https://sunsynkreports.com/llms-full.txt): Expanded site summary and page summaries for deeper model context

## Optional

- [Knowledge base](https://sunsynkreports.com/knowledgebase/): Report methodology and metric definitions
- [Privacy policy](https://sunsynkreports.com/privacy-policy/): Personal data collection, use, and protection
- [Terms of use](https://sunsynkreports.com/terms-of-use/): Legal terms for platform and report use
- [Cookie policy](https://sunsynkreports.com/cookie-policy/): Cookie types, purpose, duration, and choices
- [Sitemap](https://sunsynkreports.com/sitemap.xml): Canonical URL index for crawlers
- [robots.txt](https://sunsynkreports.com/robots.txt): Crawler allowances and sitemap location
